nasb.text: and when your herds and your flocks multiply, and your silver and gold multiply, and all that you have multiplies,

esv.text: and when your herds and flocks multiply and your silver and gold is multiplied and all that you have is multiplied,

cnv.text: 你的牛羊加多，你的金銀增添，你所有的一切都增加了，

ccb.text: 牛羊众多、金银日增的时候，
